records.sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT patient_id), localisation FROM cancers GROUP BY localisation

SELECT stade_global, COUNT(*) AS nombre_diagnostics
FROM diagnostics
GROUP BY stade_global
SELECT COUNT(patient_id) FROM patients WHERE statut_vital = 'Décédé'

SELECT categorie, COUNT(*) AS nombre_employes
FROM employes
GROUP BY categorie
SELECT COUNT(service_id) FROM services
SELECT medicament_id FROM stocks WHERE quantite <= seuil_alerte
SELECT classe_theapeutique, COUNT(*) AS nombre_medicaments FROM medicaments GROUP BY classe_theapeutique
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM factures WHERE statut = 'Impayée'

SELECT groupe_sanguin, COUNT(*) AS nombre_de_patients
FROM patients
GROUP BY groupe_sanguin

SELECT sexe, COUNT(*) AS nombre_de_patients
FROM patients
GROUP BY sexe

SELECT type, COUNT(*) AS nombre_de_traitements
FROM traitements
GROUP BY type

SELECT motif, COUNT(*) AS nombre_de_chirurgies
FROM sejours
WHERE type_sejour = 'Chirurgie'
GROUP BY motif

SELECT metier, COUNT(*) AS nombre_employes
FROM employes
GROUP BY metier

SELECT type_contrat, COUNT(*) AS nombre_contrats
FROM contrats
GROUP BY type_contrat

SELECT type_absence, COUNT(*) AS nombre_absences
FROM absences
GROUP BY type_absence
SELECT medicament_id, prix_unitaire FROM medicaments ORDER BY prix_unitaire DESC LIMIT 5

SELECT 
    strftime('%Y-%m', date) AS mois,
    COUNT(*) AS nombre_seances
FROM 
    seances_radio
WHERE 
    strftime('%Y', date) = '2026'
GROUP BY 
    mois
ORDER BY 
    mois
SELECT service_saisie FROM patients GROUP BY service_saisie HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT patient_id) > 40

SELECT s.nom AS service, SUM(e.salaire_mensuel) AS masse_salariale_mensuelle
FROM services s
JOIN employes e ON s.service_id = e.service_id
WHERE e.date_fin_contrat IS NULL
GROUP BY s.service_id

SELECT localisation, COUNT(*) AS nombre_deces
FROM patients
WHERE statut = 'Décédé'
GROUP BY localisation

SELECT AVG(jour_sejour) AS duree_moyenne_jours
FROM (
    SELECT 
        date_sortie - date_entree AS jour_sejour
    FROM 
        sejours
    WHERE 
        type_sejour = 'Hospitalisation'
)
SELECT SUM(montant) AS montant_total_facture, SUM(reste_a_charge) AS reste_a_charge_total FROM factures WHERE statut = 'Impayée'

SELECT service_id, COUNT(employe_id) AS nombre_employes_medicaux
FROM employes
GROUP BY service_id

SELECT medecin_id, COUNT(patient_id) AS nombre_de_patients
FROM traitements
GROUP BY medecin_id
ORDER BY nombre_de_patients DESC
LIMIT 5
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT patient_id), localisation FROM cancers GROUP BY localisation

SELECT stade_global, COUNT(*) AS nombre_diagnostics
FROM diagnostics
GROUP BY stade_global
SELECT COUNT(patient_id) FROM patients WHERE statut_vital = 'Décédé'
SELECT categorie, COUNT(*) FROM employes GROUP BY categorie
SELECT COUNT(service_id) FROM services
SELECT m.nom FROM medicaments m JOIN stocks s ON m.medicament_id = s.medicament_id WHERE s.quantite < s.seuil_alerte

SELECT classe, COUNT(*) AS nombre_medicaments
FROM medicaments
GROUP BY classe
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM factures WHERE statut = 'impaye'

SELECT groupe_sanguin, COUNT(*) AS nombre_patients
FROM patients
GROUP BY groupe_sanguin
SELECT sexe, COUNT(*) FROM patients GROUP BY sexe

SELECT type, COUNT(*) AS nombre_traitements
FROM traitements
GROUP BY type

SELECT type_complication, COUNT(*) AS nombre_chirurgies
FROM complications
GROUP BY type_complication

SELECT metier, COUNT(*) AS nombre_employes
FROM employes
GROUP BY metier

SELECT type_contrat, COUNT(*) AS nombre_contrats
FROM contrats
GROUP BY type_contrat

SELECT type_absence, COUNT(*) AS nombre_absences
FROM absences
GROUP BY type_absence

SELECT nom, prix_unitaire_eur 
FROM medicaments 
ORDER BY prix_unitaire_eur DESC 
LIMIT 5

SELECT 
    strftime('%Y-%m', date) AS mois,
    COUNT(*) AS nombre_seances
FROM 
    seances_radio
WHERE 
    date LIKE '2026%'
GROUP BY 
    mois
ORDER BY 
    mois
SELECT localisation FROM patients WHERE type_cancer IN ('cancer du sein', 'cancer du poumon', 'cancer du pancréas') GROUP BY localisation HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT patient_id) > 40

SELECT 
    s.service_id,
    s.nom AS nom_service,
    SUM(e.salaire_mensuel) AS masse_salariale_mensuelle
FROM 
    services s
JOIN 
    employes e ON s.service_id = e.service_id
WHERE 
    e.date_fin_contrat IS NULL OR e.date_fin_contrat > CURRENT_DATE
GROUP BY 
    s.service_id, s.nom

SELECT COUNT(patient_id), ville 
FROM patients 
WHERE statut_vital = 'Décédé' AND ville IS NOT NULL 
GROUP BY ville

SELECT AVG(julianday(date_sortie) - julianday(date_entree)) AS duree_moyenne_jours
FROM sejours
WHERE type_sejour = 'hospitalisation'

SELECT 
    SUM(CASE WHEN paiements.paiement_id IS NULL THEN lignes_facture.montant_eur ELSE 0 END) AS montant_total_facturé,
    SUM(lignes_facture.montant_eur) - SUM(CASE WHEN paiements.paiement_id IS NOT NULL THEN paiements.montant_eur ELSE 0 END) AS reste_a_charge_total
FROM 
    lignes_facture

SELECT service_id, COUNT(employe_id) AS nombre_employes_medicaux
FROM employes
GROUP BY service_id

SELECT medecin_referent_id, COUNT(patient_id) AS nb_patients
FROM patients
GROUP BY medecin_referent_id
ORDER BY nb_patients DESC
LIMIT 5

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT patient_id), localisation_cancer 
FROM patients 
GROUP BY localisation_cancer

SELECT stade_global, COUNT(*) AS nombre_diagnostics
FROM diagnostics
GROUP BY stade_global
SELECT COUNT(patient_id) FROM patients WHERE statut_vital = 'Décédé'

SELECT categorie, COUNT(*) AS nombre_employes
FROM employes
GROUP BY categorie
SELECT COUNT(service_id) AS nombre_de_services FROM services
SELECT medicament_id FROM stocks WHERE quantite < seuil_alerte

SELECT c.nom AS classe_theapeutique, COUNT(m.medicament_id) AS nombre_medicaments
FROM classes_thérapeutiques c
JOIN medicaments m ON c.classe_theapeutique_id = m.classe_theapeutique_id
GROUP BY c.classe_theapeutique
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM factures WHERE statut = 'Impayé'

SELECT 
    groupe_sanguin, 
    COUNT(*) AS nombre_de_patients
FROM 
    patients
GROUP BY 
    groupe_sanguin

SELECT sexe, COUNT(*) AS nombre_de_patients
FROM patients
GROUP BY sexe

SELECT type, COUNT(*) AS nombre_de_traitements
FROM traitements
GROUP BY type

SELECT 
    s.type_sejour AS type_chirurgie,
    COUNT(*) AS nombre_de_chirurgies
FROM 
    sejours s
JOIN 
    traitements t ON s.patient_id = t.patient_id
WHERE 
    s.type_sejour = 'Chirurgie'
GROUP BY 
    s.type_sejour

SELECT metier, COUNT(*) AS nombre_employes
FROM employes
GROUP BY metier

SELECT type_contrat, COUNT(*) AS nombre_contrats
FROM contrats
GROUP BY type_contrat

SELECT type_absence, COUNT(*) AS nombre_absences
FROM absences
GROUP BY type_absence
SELECT nom, prix_unitaire FROM medicaments ORDER BY prix_unitaire DESC LIMIT 5

SELECT 
    strftime('%Y-%m', date) AS mois,
    COUNT(*) AS nombre_seances
FROM 
    seances_radio
WHERE 
    STRFTIME('%Y', date) = '2026'
GROUP BY 
    strftime('%Y-%m', date)
ORDER BY 
    mois
SELECT nom FROM services WHERE service_id IN ( SELECT service_id FROM sejours GROUP BY service_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT patient_id) > 40 )

SELECT 
    s.service_id,
    s.nom AS nom_service,
    SUM(e.salaire_mensuel) AS masse_salariale_mensuelle
FROM 
    services s
JOIN 
    employes e ON s.service_id = e.service_id
JOIN 
    contrats c ON e.employe_id = c.employe_id
WHERE 
    c.date_fin > CURRENT_DATE OR c.date_fin IS NULL
GROUP BY

SELECT 
    c.localisation, 
    COUNT(p.patient_id) AS nombre_deces
FROM 
    patients p
JOIN 
    diagnostics d ON p.patient_id = d.patient_id
JOIN 
    cancers c ON d.cancer_id = c.cancer_id
WHERE 
    p.decede = 1
GROUP BY 
    c.localisation

SELECT AVG(julianday(date_sortie) - julianday(date_entree)) AS durée_moyenne_jours
FROM sejours
WHERE type_sejour = 'Hôpital de jour'

SELECT 
    SUM(montant_facture) AS total_facture,
    SUM(reste_a_charge) AS total_reste_a_charge
FROM 
    factures
WHERE 
    statut = 'Impayée'

SELECT services.nom AS nom_service, COUNT(employes.employe_id) AS nombre_employes_medicaux
FROM services
JOIN employes ON services.service_id = employes.service_id
GROUP BY services.service_id

SELECT e.employe_id, e.nom, e.prenom, COUNT(DISTINCT p.patient_id) AS nb_patients
FROM employes e
JOIN traitements t ON e.employe_id = t.medecin_id
JOIN patients p ON t.patient_id = p.patient_id
GROUP BY e.employe_id, e.nom, e.prenom
ORDER BY nb_patients DESC
LIMIT 5
SELECT localisation, COUNT(DISTINCT patient_id) AS nb_patients FROM diagnostics GROUP BY localisation
SELECT stade_global, COUNT(DISTINCT diagnostic_id) AS nb_diagnostics FROM diagnostics GROUP BY stade_global ORDER BY nb_diagnostics DESC
SELECT COUNT(patient_id) FROM patients WHERE statut_vital = 'Décédé'
SELECT categorie, COUNT(employe_id) AS nb_employes FROM employes GROUP BY categorie ORDER BY nb_employes DESC
SELECT COUNT(service_id) AS nombre_services FROM services
SELECT medicament_id, nom FROM medicaments WHERE medicament_id IN ( SELECT medicament_id FROM stocks WHERE quantite < seuil_alerte )
SELECT classe, COUNT(DISTINCT medicament_id) AS nb_medicaments FROM medicaments GROUP BY classe ORDER BY nb_medicaments DESC
SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN statut = 'Impayé' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS nb_factures_impayees FROM factures
SELECT groupe_sanguin, COUNT(DISTINCT patient_id) AS nb_patients FROM patients GROUP BY groupe_sanguin ORDER BY nb_patients DESC
SELECT sexe, COUNT(DISTINCT patient_id) AS nb_patients FROM patients GROUP BY sexe
SELECT type, COUNT(traitement_id) AS nb_traitements FROM traitements GROUP BY type ORDER BY nb_traitements DESC
SELECT complications, COUNT(chirurgie_id) AS nb_chirurgies FROM chirurgies GROUP BY complications ORDER BY nb_chirurgies DESC
SELECT metier, COUNT(*) AS nombre_employes FROM employes GROUP BY metier ORDER BY nombre_employes DESC
SELECT type_contrat, COUNT(contrat_id) AS nb_contrats FROM contrats WHERE date_fin IS NULL GROUP BY type_contrat ORDER BY nb_contrats DESC
SELECT type, COUNT(absence_id) AS nb_absences FROM absences WHERE flag_archive = 0 AND flag_anonymise = 0 GROUP BY type ORDER BY nb_absences DESC
SELECT nom, prix_unitaire_eur FROM medicaments ORDER BY prix_unitaire_eur DESC LIMIT 5
SELECT strftime('%Y-%m', date) AS mois, COUNT(seance_id) AS nombre_seances FROM seances_radio WHERE date >= '2026-01-01' GROUP BY mois ORDER BY mois
SELECT localisation, COUNT(DISTINCT patient_id) AS nb_patients FROM diagnostics GROUP BY localisation HAVING nb_patients > 40 ORDER BY nb_patients DESC

SELECT se.nom AS service, SUM(c.salaire_brut_mensuel) AS masse_salariale FROM contrats c JOIN employes e ON e.employe_id = c.employe_id JOIN services se ON se.service_id = e.service_id WHERE c.date_fin IS NULL GROUP BY se.nom ORDER BY masse_salariale DESC

SELECT d.localisation, COUNT(DISTINCT p.patient_id) AS nb_patients FROM patients p JOIN diagnostics d ON d.patient_id = p.patient_id WHERE p.statut_vital = 'Décédé' GROUP BY d.localisation ORDER BY nb_patients DESC
SELECT AVG(julianday(date_sortie) - julianday(date_entree)) AS duree_moyenne FROM sejours WHERE type_sejour = 'Hospitalisation' AND date_sortie IS NOT NULL
SELECT SUM(montant_total_eur) AS montant_facture, SUM(reste_a_charge_eur) AS reste_a_charge FROM factures WHERE statut = 'Impayée'
SELECT s.nom AS service, COUNT(e.employe_id) AS nb_employes FROM employes e JOIN services s ON s.service_id = e.service_id WHERE e.metier LIKE '%médecin%' GROUP BY s.nom ORDER BY nb_employes DESC
SELECT p.nom, COUNT(DISTINCT p.patient_id) AS nb_patients FROM patients p JOIN employes m ON m.employe_id = p.medecin_referent_id GROUP BY p.medecin_referent_id ORDER BY nb_patients DESC LIMIT 5
SELECT localisation, COUNT(DISTINCT patient_id) AS nb_patients FROM diagnostics GROUP BY localisation ORDER BY nb_patients DESC
SELECT stade_global, COUNT(*) AS n FROM diagnostics GROUP BY stade_global
SELECT COUNT(patient_id) AS nb_patients FROM patients WHERE statut_vital = 'Décédé'
SELECT categorie, COUNT(*) AS n FROM employes GROUP BY categorie
SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM services
SELECT m.nom FROM stocks s JOIN medicaments m ON m.medicament_id = s.medicament_id WHERE s.quantite < s.seuil_alerte
SELECT classe, COUNT(*) AS n FROM medicaments GROUP BY classe
SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM factures WHERE statut = 'Impayée'
SELECT groupe_sanguin, COUNT(*) as n FROM patients GROUP BY groupe_sanguin
SELECT sexe, COUNT(*) AS n FROM patients GROUP BY sexe
SELECT type, COUNT(*) AS n FROM traitements GROUP BY type
SELECT complications, COUNT(*) AS n FROM chirurgies GROUP BY complications
SELECT metier, COUNT(*) AS n FROM employes GROUP BY metier
SELECT type_contrat, COUNT(*) AS n FROM contrats GROUP BY type_contrat
SELECT type, COUNT(*) AS n FROM absences GROUP BY type
SELECT nom, prix_unitaire_eur FROM medicaments ORDER BY prix_unitaire_eur DESC LIMIT 5
SELECT strftime('%Y-%m', date) AS mois, COUNT(*) AS n FROM seances_radio WHERE date >= '2026-01-01' AND date < '2027-01-01' GROUP BY mois ORDER BY mois

SELECT d.localisation, COUNT(DISTINCT p.patient_id) AS nb_patients FROM diagnostics d JOIN patients p ON d.patient_id = p.patient_id WHERE d.localisation IS NOT NULL GROUP BY d.localisation HAVING nb_patients > 40 ORDER BY nb_patients DESC

SELECT se.nom AS service, SUM(c.salaire_brut_mensuel) AS masse_salariale FROM contrats c JOIN employes e ON e.employe_id = c.employe_id JOIN services se ON se.service_id = e.service_id WHERE c.date_fin IS NULL GROUP BY se.nom ORDER BY masse_salariale DESC
SELECT d.localisation, COUNT(DISTINCT p.patient_id) AS n FROM patients p JOIN diagnostics d ON d.patient_id = p.patient_id WHERE p.statut_vital = 'Décédé' GROUP BY d.localisation
SELECT AVG(julianday(date_sortie) - julianday(date_entree)) AS duree FROM sejours WHERE type_sejour = 'Hospitalisation'
SELECT SUM(montant_total_eur) AS montant_facture, SUM(reste_a_charge_eur) AS reste_a_charge FROM factures WHERE statut = 'Impayée'
SELECT nom, COUNT(*) AS nb_employes_medicaux FROM employes WHERE categorie = 'Medical' GROUP BY nom
SELECT e.nom, COUNT(DISTINCT p.patient_id) AS nb_patients FROM employes e JOIN patients p ON p.medecin_referent_id = e.employe_id GROUP BY e.employe_id ORDER BY nb_patients DESC LIMIT 5
